summary: Comprehensive RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) testing completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified admin_principal has full access to all sidebar items including Utilisateurs, Paiements, Bannières, and Paramètres. Admin_secondary correctly has limited access - cannot see Utilisateurs, Paiements, Bannières, or Paramètres groups. Users section shows 4 tabs: Tous, Admins Principaux, Admins Secondaires, Utilisateurs.
seed_data_creation: admin_secondary user (secondary@test.com) already exists with role admin_secondary
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully tested. Two admin tiers: admin_principal (full access) and admin_secondary (limited - no access to users, payments, banners). Backend uses get_principal_admin dependency for restricted endpoints. Frontend uses isPrincipalAdmin flag from AuthContext to conditionally render sidebar items.

backend_rbac_setup.admin_principal_login: PASS - admin@winners-consulting.com can login with role admin/admin_principal
backend_rbac_setup.admin_secondary_login: PASS - secondary@test.com can login with role admin_secondary

frontend_admin_principal.users_section_tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: Tous (15), Admins Principaux (1), Admins Secondaires (2), Utilisateurs (12)
frontend_admin_principal.role_dropdown: PASS - Role change dropdown visible for each user

frontend_admin_secondary.sidebar_parametres_group: PASS - Entire group NOT visible (correctly hidden)
